title: Something Different Wholesale White Owl Oil Burner,White
features: Deep bowl suitable for wax melts and fragranced oils
To be used with a tea light
description: Product Description Collectable, quirky and fun the Jones Home & Gift brand offers innovative, unique and desirable gifts which are exclusively distributed by Something Different Wholesale. This lovely white Owl ceramic oil burner has a deep bowl which makes it suitable for burning fragranced oils as well as wax melts. H:11cm W:9cm D:7cm. Directions Use with a tea light candle. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Box Contains 1 ceramic oil burner in cardboard box. See more
